caption:
From rich hot chocolates ☕️ to homemade fudge, classic mince pies 🥧 and gingerbread cookies 🍪, we checked out the Christmas shop at @the_landmark_london 🎄✨ The perfect spot for festive treats on the go while soaking up the holiday magic. The gingerbread house cafe is made of edible biscuits and macaroons .. so creative . With @kseniia.journey 

It’s only eight more sleeps to go until Christmas — how is everyone feeling? 🎅🎁 Merry Christmas!
